eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Mason, WA; at 03:02 PM ON MAY 20, 2026 Effective until 04:02 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Washington State Patrol on behalf of Shelton Police Department, has issued an Amber Alert for 4-year-old Kyson Moen. Victim is a 4-year-old Male named Kyson Moen. Victim has Brown hair wearing a black shirt with Batman. They were last seen on 05-20-2026 at 12:30. They are in the company of Joshua Moen, a 26-year-old Male, who is 5 Foot 8 Inches, weighing 180 lbs with the words "Northwest" and a tree tattoo on left arm, the words "rock" on right knuckles and "roll" on left knuckles. They may be traveling on foot. If you have information, please call 9 1 1.
